CustomField.description: 関係構築度がLv4以上の場合チェックされる
CustomField.formula: IF(OR(TEXT( CW_RelationshipDegree__c )= "Lv4",TEXT( CW_RelationshipDegree__c )= "Lv5",TEXT( CW_RelationshipDegree__c )= "Lv6",TEXT( CW_RelationshipDegree__c )= "Lv7",TEXT( CW_RelationshipDegree__c )= "Lv8"),TRUE,FALSE)
CustomField.label: *攻略クリア
